biography.value: A Void Tempest is an apex Air Nephilim that has existed long enough to understand mortal warfare at a strategic rather than tactical level. World-Storm Presence on arrival; World Vortex Aura maintaining continuous battlefield control; Heaven's Bolt suppressing enemy formations at range while Worldstorm Strike removes priority targets. It will communicate its assessment of the engagement openly and expects the summoner to engage with that assessment rather than simply repeat instructions. A summoner who treats a Void Tempest as a tool will find it technically compliant. One who treats it as a partner will find it does things with that relationship that compliance alone cannot produce.

system.attacksNotes:
• Worldstorm Strike [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 8 + Melee Combat 8), Reach: 20 ft
    • Margin 1: 16 damage (Huge, heavy: 14 + 2) + 12 lightning damage (Half DR); target pushed 30 feet + Prone; no save
    • Margin 2: 24 damage (16 + 8 Str) + 12 lightning damage; pushed 30 feet + Prone + Stunned; all creatures within 20 feet of target take 12 lightning damage (Half DR) + Dazed from the discharge
    • Margin 3: 24 damage + 12 lightning damage + Prone + Stunned; discharge area takes 20 lightning damage + Stunned; no save on area
  • Heaven's Bolt [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 7 + Ranged Combat 8), Range: 200 ft, 20-foot radius
    • Per creature in radius: Net 1: 24 lightning damage (Half DR) + Stunned until end of their next turn. Net 2: 48 lightning damage + Stunned + Deafened for 1 minute. Net 3: 48 lightning damage + Stunned + Deafened + knocked Prone; no save.
system.specialAbilitiesNotes:
• World Vortex Aura: Creatures within 30 feet that are not designated make a Fortitude save at the start of their turn (Hard task, 2 successes). Failure: pushed 30 feet, knocked Prone, and Deafened for 1 minute. 1 success: pushed 15 feet only.
  • Powerful Build.
  • World-Storm Presence (1/day) [Combat]: As 2 [Combat] actions, the Void Tempest manifests its full elemental nature in an 80-foot radius. All non-designated creatures make a Reflex save (Hard task, 2 successes). Failure: 48 lightning damage + Stunned for 1 minute + Deafened permanently (Fortitude save, 2 successes, to reduce to 1 hour). 1 success: 24 damage + Stunned until end of their next turn. 2 successes: 12 damage only. Buildings and structures take structural damage.
  • Lightning Immunity Sharing: As Storm Titan, extended to 6 designated allies.
  • Intimidating Presence: As Tempest Lord.
  • Resilient Defense (3/day).
